chapter_title: Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws
text: This article does not preclude a local authority from imposing more stringent operating or equipment requirements on a pedicab subject to this article.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 1. Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws [21000 - 21300]
#### Article 4.5. Operation of Pedicabs [21215 - 21215.5]
##### § 21215.5

This article does not preclude a local authority from imposing more stringent operating or equipment requirements on a pedicab subject to this article.

*(Added by Stats. 2015, Ch. 496, Sec. 2. (SB 530) Effective January 1, 2016.)*

subsections.text: This article does not preclude a local authority from imposing more stringent operating or equipment requirements on a pedicab subject to this article.
